risk.desc: Potential for misrouting harnesses due to limited space in harness paths.
risk.mit: Provide detailed routing diagrams and use color-coded harnesses.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal expansion causing misalignment in bolted interfaces.
risk.mit: Use thermal expansion compensators in critical bolted joints.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Assembly order evidence, inspection windows, readiness checklist hooks, connection types and load-path closure
